title: Diamond Netherite
description: A resource pack that tweaks netherite to have a lil diamond on it
body:
# Add a bit of diamond to netherite armor and tools!

It is a simple texture tweak adding a bit of diamond to the armor and tools.

![Netherite chestplate flaoting in the center on top of a pillar block, with 2 armor stands equipped with netherite armor on each side](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/048cc9f86094a741948be6bb3ae1b76d0dae0478.png)
![Netherite tools, Left to right: Sword, axe, pickaxe, shovel, and hoe all floating on pillars](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/203297b0b0ee344b57f04e4b854f8a8b609750d0.png)

Added for:
The Aether
Farmer's Delight
Dungeon Delight
Spartan Weaponry

If you want the pack with just the vanilla texture tweaks, I recommend just grabbing the original upload. Also the newer upload is considered 1.20 rather than 1.21 as I tweaked the meta file - it'll still work fine for newer and older versions. If anything doesn't show up, lmk and I'll fix it when I can.

![Netherite Gloves on an Armor stand next to an Item Frame with Netherite Gloves, next to another Armor Stand with full Netherite Armor with Netherite Gloves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/2cOWR8KE/images/915a9c547da9f28ac4c669828036fac83550a0da.png)
![On the left, The Netherite Cleaver on an Item Frame and Cutting Board. On the right, Netherite Knife on an item frame and Cutting Board](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/2cOWR8KE/images/fbd71814183fd7680fccaac94798933581b3e7a6.png)
![Throwing Knife, Tomahawk, and Javelin both in an item frame and embedded in the barrier holding the frames up](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/2cOWR8KE/images/708779d9d4bf422ec61634d0d06e3343d3e1b7c1.png)
